subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been presented at the Most Holy Court, and the Eye of Loving-kindness gazeth upon it. Praise be unto the Beloved of all existence, Who through His knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوبت در ساحت اقدس حاضر و عین عنایت بان ناظر حمد محبوب امکان را که بعرفانش
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
